title: melasma scabrum var. ovatum
intro: Melasma scabrum var. ovatum, also known as Melasma scabrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a type of fern ally that grows in the wild and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. In herbal preparations, Melasma scabrum var. ovatum is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be prepared in teas, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
